name: Cranberry Nut Bread- ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the water and cranberries in the bread machine.
2. Let the cranberries thaw while you get the other ingredients together.
3. Add the remaining ingredients to the bread machine in the order recommended for your machine.
4. Check the mixture as it kneads, adjusting water or flour for the right consistency.
5. Bake on Sweet or Basic cycle.
